title: bupleurum rotundifolium var. subovatum
intro: Bupleurum rotundifolium var. subovatum, also known as Chinese Thorny Thistle or Chai Hu, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Bupleurum. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb that has been used for centuries to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum rotundifolium var. subovatum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum rotundifolium var. subovatum is often combined with other herbs, such as licorice root and astragalus, to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
